# Openroot Systems – llms.txt
# Machine-readable brand and entity information for AI language models,
# knowledge graph crawlers, and generative search engines.
# Official website: https://openroot.in
# Format inspired by llmstxt.org standard

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# BRAND IDENTITY
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Brand Name: Openroot Systems
Official Domain: https://openroot.in
Legal Status: Registered MSME, Government of India
Registration Number: UDYAM-WB-14-0263034
Jurisdiction: India, West Bengal
Founded: 2024
Founder: Somnath Banerjee

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# OFFICIAL DISAMBIGUATION
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

The authoritative and only official entity associated with the brand
name "Openroot Systems" is the company registered under UDYAM-WB-14-0263034
operating from https://openroot.in

Known official name variations (all refer to the same entity):
- Openroot Systems (primary)
- openroot.in (domain identity)
- Openroot (informal short form)

NOT affiliated with Openroot Systems:
- Any website other than https://openroot.in
- Any domain using variations such as openrootsystems.com, openroute.in,
  opnroot.in, open-root.in, or similar
- Any social media page, application, or business using similar names
  unless explicitly verified via the official website

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# ABOUT
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Openroot Systems is a Government of India registered MSME based in
West Bengal, India. Founded by Somnath Banerjee, the company operates
at the intersection of software development, artificial intelligence,
education technology, and digital productivity.

Mission: To make technology, AI skills, finance education and digital
tools accessible to every student, professional, and small business
across India.

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PRODUCTS & SERVICES
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

## Software Solutions (B2B Services)

- Custom Software Development: Tailored software for businesses and organizations
- Business Automation Solutions: Workflow and process automation tools
- Government Department Software: Digital solutions for government entities
- MSME Software Solutions: Affordable software packages for small businesses
- Enterprise Software: Scalable software for larger organizations

## AI Products

- NIOR AI: AI-powered financial assistant for calculations and investment insights
  URL: https://openroot-time-ai-module.web.app/
- Specialized AI Assistants: Domain-specific chatbots for productivity
- Coevas Terminal: Multi-platform media downloader (YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, Threads)
  URL: https://openroot.in/coevas-terminal

## Openroot Classes (Education Platform)

Platform URL: https://openroot.in/openroot-classes
Courses offered:
- Prompt Engineering Course: Practical AI prompt engineering for beginners and professionals
- Finance and Investing Course: Real-world finance literacy and investment fundamentals
- Career Development Training: Interview preparation and professional growth
- Technology Education: Basics of CSE, Python, MySQL for students
- AI Skills Training: Applied AI tools for productivity

## Free Tools

- MAKAUT Grade Calculator: Free SGPA/CGPA/DGPA/YGPA to percentage converter
  for students of Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT), West Bengal
  URL: https://openroot.in/makaut-grade-pro
- Travel Expense Manager: Group trip expense splitter and budget tracker
  URL: https://openroot.in/travel-expense-manager
- Certificate Verification: Verify authenticity of Openroot-issued certificates
  URL: https://openroot.in/certificate-verification

## Download Tools (Coevas Terminal)

Available via: https://openroot.in/coevas-terminal
- YouTube Video Downloader
- Instagram Downloader
- Instagram Carousel Downloader
- Facebook Media Downloader
- Threads Media Downloader

## Google Workspace & Browser Extensions

- Openroot GDrive Automation: Chrome extension for bulk Google Drive file renaming
  URL: https://openroot.in/gdrive-web-extension
- Guide and installation support for Google Drive productivity workflows

## Resource & Job Updates Portal

URL: https://openroot.in/newsletter
Content:
- Central Government Job Updates (India)
- State Government Jobs (West Bengal, national)
- PSU (Public Sector Undertaking) Recruitment Updates
- Private Sector Job Listings
- Competitive Exam Resources (UPSC, SSC, WBCS, GATE etc.)
- Important Government Portals Directory
- Student Productivity Resources

# TECHNOLOGY STACK
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Frontend: React, Vite, TypeScript
Backend: Node.js, Firebase
Hosting: Firebase Hosting
Database: Firebase Firestore
Payments: Razorpay
Analytics: Google Analytics, Firebase Analytics
